overall.description: A cinematic 360-degree pan of a Gryffindor dormitory room from a Harry Potter video game, showcasing medieval stone architecture, wooden four-poster beds with red curtains, and warm natural light streaming through tall gothic windows. The high-quality game engine rendering reveals detailed furnishings including wardrobes, a cast iron stove, leather armchairs, and a study desk with towering stacks of books.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor dormitory bedroom with four-poster beds and wardrobes

agents.ego_description: slowly panning across the dormitory entrance area observing the wooden wardrobes and first two four-poster beds

entered.detail: dark wood double-door wardrobe with silver handles and a house crest banner on the side
metal coat stand with curved hooks holding a pink garment
dark wooden four-poster bed with red velvet curtains and white pillows
matching four-poster bed with red bedding and dark wood frame
rough-hewn grey stone block walls with medieval texture
exposed dark wooden rafters and beams supporting the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the left side of a circular medieval dormitory room, focusing on a dark wooden wardrobe and coat stand. As the camera pans right, two four-poster beds with rich red curtains come into view against the stone block walls, with warm light from hanging lanterns illuminating the wooden ceiling beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: central common area with heating stove and tall gothic windows

events.description: camera pans toward tall gothic windows increasing natural daylight and creating bright shafts of light across the floor

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan around the room's center, revealing the cast iron stove and seating area near the windows

entered.detail: black cast iron heating stove with vertical pipe extending to the ceiling
tufted brown leather armchair with wooden legs near the window
tall narrow arched window with multiple panes letting in bright natural light
red and gold Gryffindor house banner with lion crest hanging from ceiling
second dark wooden wardrobe with robes hanging on the side
small skeleton figure standing on a pedestal near the wardrobe

segments.scene_description: The view transitions to the central area of the dormitory where bright natural light streams through tall gothic windows. A cast iron stove stands in the middle of the room, with leather armchairs arranged nearby. Red and gold house banners hang from the ceiling beams, and a second wardrobe with a small skeleton model comes into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: study corner with desk and towering book stacks

events.description: view shifts from common seating area to study desk with precariously stacked books

agents.ego_description: panning to the study corner showing the wooden desk, quill, inkpot, and towering stacks of books

entered.detail: dark wooden writing desk with open books, quill, and inkpot
precariously tall vertical stack of books reaching nearly to the ceiling
vintage floor lamp with fringed beige lampshade and brass stand
dark wooden paneled door with square decorative carvings
lower wall covered in dark wood paneling contrasting with stone above

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the study area of the dormitory, featuring a wooden desk cluttered with books and writing implements. A strikingly tall, precarious stack of books towers beside the desk. The camera continues past a vintage floor lamp with a fringed shade, completing the 360-degree pan as it approaches the wooden exit door and returns to the starting area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous 360-degree pan through a medieval dormitory that transitions from the dim, cozy corners of the room into a bright, sunlit central space before settling on a cluttered study area. It begins on the left side of the circular room, gliding past a dark wooden wardrobe and coat stand toward two four-poster beds with rich red curtains set against stone block walls. As the camera continues its rotation, the scene opens into the center of the room where bright natural light streams through tall gothic windows, illuminating a cast iron stove, leather armchairs, and red and gold house banners. The view then shifts toward a study area featuring a wooden desk cluttered with writing implements and a precarious, towering stack of books. Finally, the camera moves past a vintage floor lamp with a fringed shade, completing the circle as it approaches the wooden exit door to return to the starting point.
